scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && vue-tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:wasm: cd ../pitch-core && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm --release && (wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pitch_core.wasm --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --target web || (cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/pitch_core.wasm --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --target web))
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && cd ../desktop && npm run tauri build
